2605.21299.title: Tracing the ongoing emergence of human-like reasoning in Large Language Models
2605.21299.paper_summary: Humans effortlessly go beyond literal meanings: If you mow the lawn, I will give you fifty dollars, is typically understood as implying that the speaker will pay only if the lawn is mowed, whereas If you are hungry, there is pizza in the oven implies that pizza is available regardless of the hearers hunger. Large Language Models - LLMs - show human-like performance on many tasks, yet it remains unclear whether they reason like humans. To address this, we conducted a population-matching experiment assessing how twentyfive LLMs compute conditional inferences across four languages, compared to an equal number of humans per language. We find that humans enrich logical reasoning through pragmatic inferences across languages. Model behavior is more variable. Some LLMs perfectly follow the truth-table of conditionals but they ignore pragmatic inferences, while others deviate from the truth-table, adhering to a single interpretation across the board, thus reflecting accurate rule-based processing but not human-like reasoning. Overall, LLMs are accurate semantic operators, but fail to capture the pragmatic enrichments characteristic of human reasoning. Crucially, LLM accuracy is neither predicted nor boosted by open vs. closed status, training orientation, or architecture type, suggesting that pragmatic reasoning is still an emerging ability in the cognitive toolkit of artificial systems.
2605.21299.paper_summary_zh: 人類輕鬆超越字面意義：如果你修剪草坪，我會給你五十美元，通常被理解為說話者只有在草坪被修剪的情況下才會支付，而如果你餓了，烤箱裡有披薩則暗示著無論聽者是否餓，披薩都是可用的。大型語言模型（LLMs）在許多任務上展現出類似人類的表現，但它們是否像人類一樣推理仍然不清楚。為了解決這個問題，我們進行了一項人口匹配實驗，評估二十五個LLMs在四種語言中如何計算條件推理，並與每種語言的相同數量人類進行比較。我們發現人類通過語用推理在不同語言中豐富了邏輯推理。模型行為變化更大。一些LLMs完全遵循條件的真值表，但忽略了語用推理，而其他LLMs則偏離真值表，堅持單一解釋，從而反映出準確的基於規則的處理，但不是類似人類的推理。總的來說，LLMs是準確的語義運算子，但未能捕捉到人類推理特有的語用豐富性。關鍵是，LLM的準確性既不受開放與封閉狀態、訓練方向或架構類型的預測或提升，這表明語用推理仍然是人工系統認知工具箱中一種新興的能力。
2605.21299.author: Paolo Morosi et.al.
2605.21299.authors: Paolo Morosi, Nikoleta Pantelidou, Fritz Günther, Elena Pagliarini, Evelina Leivada
